headline: S&P 500 rises as investors bet on eventual Iran resolution: Live updates
summary: All three major averages are coming off their best week since November on hopes that the conflict will soon come to an end.

headline: Goldman Sachs, Bank of America, JP Morgan, Netflix, J&J, Producer Prices, and More to Watch This Week
summary: Big Banks kick off first-quarter earnings, but we’ll also hear from Abbot Labs, PepsiCo, ASML, and more. And we’ll see economic data on producer prices, housing, and the mood among small businesses.

headline: Wall Street Brunch: Earnings Arrive Amid Hormuz Standoff

headline: How The Descartes Systems Group (TSX:DSG) Story Is Shifting On Growth Strength And Valuation Pressure
summary: The fair value estimate for Descartes Systems Group sits at CA$128.28, with no change to the intrinsic value target in this update. Behind that steady figure, bullish analysts point to stronger than expected Q4 results and organic growth. More cautious voices, however, focus on lower sector valuation multiples that have driven recent target cuts elsewhere. Read on to see how these competing views are shaping the evolving narrative around the stock and what to watch next. Stay updated as the...

headline: How global fiscal policy is reacting to the recent energy shock
summary: Investing.com -- As global energy markets navigate a fresh wave of supply disruptions, the fiscal "safety net" that cushioned consumers during the 2022-23 crisis is notably thinner.
